sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89302" key="prose/reisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσέρεισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pressure against</tr_>, Hierocl.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0543.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.19A" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.19A.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
